Biography个人简介

Mengyu Chang is a postdoctoral fellow in the Department of Radiation Oncology at The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center.

Her research focuses on multifunctional nanomaterials for cancer diagnosis and therapy, including single-atom nanozymes, tumor microenvironment-responsive nanocomposites, multimodal imaging-guided therapy, photothermal and photodynamic therapy, ferroptosis-boosted treatment, and cancer immunotherapy.

Before joining MD Anderson, she was a postdoctoral fellow at Nanyang Technological University and completed her Ph.D. at the Changchun Institute of Applied Chemistry, Chinese Academy of Sciences.

常梦宇现为德克萨斯大学 MD Anderson 癌症中心放射肿瘤学系博士后研究员。

她的研究聚焦于用于肿瘤诊断与治疗的多功能纳米材料，包括单原子纳米酶、肿瘤微环境响应型纳米复合材料、多模态影像引导治疗、光热/光动力治疗、铁死亡增强治疗和肿瘤免疫治疗。

加入 MD Anderson 之前，她曾在新加坡南洋理工大学从事博士后研究，并在中国科学院长春应用化学研究所获得博士学位。

Research focus研究方向

Mengyu's work develops multifunctional nanomaterials, single-atom nanozymes, and tumor microenvironment-responsive platforms for multimodal imaging-guided cancer therapy.她的工作发展多功能纳米材料、单原子纳米酶以及肿瘤微环境响应平台，用于多模态影像引导的肿瘤治疗。

News最新动态

2026.07

SITEUPDATE Personal academic website launched with CV-based publications and Scholar tracking support.

2023.01

CAREER Joined the Department of Radiation Oncology at The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center as a postdoctoral fellow.

2023

PAPERJOURNAL NIR-Activatable Heterostructured Nanoadjuvant CoP/NiCoP Executing Lactate Metabolism Interventions for Boosted Photocatalytic Hydrogen Therapy and Photoimmunotherapy appeared in Advanced Materials.

2023

PAPERJOURNAL Single-Atom Nanozymes Based Nanobee Vehicle for Autophagy Inhibition-Enhanced Synergistic Cancer Therapy appeared in Nano Today.

Research研究方向

Her research builds therapeutic nanomaterials that sense the tumor microenvironment, convert external energy into therapeutic effects, and coordinate multiple treatment pathways.她的研究构建能够感知肿瘤微环境、将外部能量转化为治疗效应并协同多种治疗通路的纳米治疗材料。

01

Thread 01方向 01

Single-Atom Nanozymes单原子纳米酶

Designing atomically dispersed catalytic sites to regulate reactive oxygen species, metabolism, ferroptosis, and mild photothermal therapeutic response.设计原子级分散的催化位点，用于调控活性氧、细胞代谢、铁死亡以及温和光热治疗响应。

02

Thread 02方向 02

Imaging-Guided Phototherapy影像引导光治疗

Constructing photothermal, photodynamic, photoacoustic, and multimodal imaging platforms for precise cancer therapy under near-infrared activation.构建光热、光动力、光声和多模态影像平台，在近红外激发下实现精准肿瘤治疗。

03

Thread 03方向 03

Tumor Microenvironment-Responsive Therapy肿瘤微环境响应治疗

Engineering biodegradable and metabolizable nanocomposites that respond to tumor acidity, redox state, lactate metabolism, and immune contexture.开发可降解、可代谢的纳米复合材料，响应肿瘤酸性、氧化还原状态、乳酸代谢和免疫微环境。

Amphiphilic Ligand In Situ Assembly of Uranyl Active Sites and Selective Interactions of Molybdenum Disulfide

Yuhui Liu, Yaning Lu, Shuang Zhang, Xiaoyan Li, Zhibin Zhang, Liya Ge, Mengyu Chang*, Yunhai Liu*, Grzegorz Lisak, and Sheng Deng*

Journal of Hazardous Materials, 442, 130089 · DOI: 10.1016/j.jhazmat.2022.130089

2

Journal of Hazardous Materials, 459, 132112 · DOI: 10.1016/j.jhazmat.2023.132112

Nano Today, 52, 101981 · DOI: 10.1016/j.nantod.2023.101981

4

Yuhui Liu, Jiayin Zhao, Ke Zhao, Shuang Zhang, Rongteng Tian, Mengyu Chang, Yingcai Wang, Xiaoyan Li, Liya Ge, and Grzegorz Lisak

Journal of Environmental Chemical Engineering, 11, 111563 · DOI: 10.1016/j.jece.2023.111563

5

Heterostructural Nanoadjuvant CuSe/CoSe2 for Potentiating Ferroptosis and Photoimmunotherapy through Intratumoral Blocked Lactate Efflux

Chunzheng Yang, Man Wang, Mengyu Chang, Meng Yuan, Wenying Zhang, Jia Tan, Binbin Ding, Ping'an Ma*, and Jun Lin*

Journal of the American Chemical Society, 145, 7205-7217 · DOI: 10.1021/jacs.2c12772

6

Advanced Materials, 2308774 · DOI: 10.1002/adma.202308774

7

Man Wang, Mengyu Chang, Pan Zheng, Qianqian Sun, Guangqiang Wang, Jun Lin*, and Chunxia Li*

Advanced Science, 9, 2202332 · DOI: 10.1002/advs.202202332

8

Chemistry - A European Journal, 28, e202104081 · DOI: 10.1002/chem.202104081
